offer: For medical clinics processing 20–50 claims/month, inaccurate patient eligibility tracking causes claim denials. We automate eligibility tracking and claim filing instead of manual tracking and filing of claims.
problem: Inaccurate patient eligibility tracking leads to claim denials.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
Indie Hackers discussions on claims management
DM outreach with demo video to clinics
Engage in community forums for medical tools
try_it: Let users try manual claim entry and eligibility tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
